mapper.sql: comment_id, user_id, movie_id, content, votes, comment_time, title, type, version
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM comments
AND content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY comment_time DESC

SELECT c.comment_id as id, c.user_id as userId, c.movie_id as movieId, c.content as content, c.votes as votes, c.comment_time as commentTime, c.title as title, c.type as type, u.user_nickname as userNickname, u.user_avatar as userAvatar, r.rating as rating, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isLiked FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ratings r ON c.user_id = r.user_id AND c.movie_id = r.movie_id LEFT JOIN comment_likes cl ON c.comment_id = cl.comment_id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE c.movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY c.comment_time DESC

SELECT c.comment_id as id, c.user_id as userId, c.movie_id as movieId, c.content as content, c.votes as votes, c.comment_time as commentTime, c.title as title, c.type as type, c.version as version, u.user_nickname as userNickname, u.user_avatar as userAvatar, r.rating as rating, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isLiked FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ratings r ON c.user_id = r.user_id AND c.movie_id = r.movie_id LEFT JOIN comment_likes cl ON c.comment_id = cl.comment_id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE c.movie_id = #{movieId} AND c.comment_id = #{commentId} AND c.type = 2 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, movie_id, content, votes, comment_time, title, type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{content}, #{votes}, #{commentTime}, #{title}, #{type})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId}
SELECT FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId} AND type = #{type}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comments WHERE comment_id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id as id, c.user_id as userId, c.movie_id as movieId, c.content as content, c.votes as votes, c.comment_time as commentTime, c.title as title, c.type as type, u.user_nickname as userNickname, u.user_avatar as userAvatar, r.rating as rating, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isLiked FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ratings r ON c.user_id = r.user_id AND c.movie_id = r.movie_id LEFT JOIN comment_likes cl ON c.comment_id = cl.comment_id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE c.movie_id = #{movieId} AND c.type = #{type} ORDER BY c.comment_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId} AND type = #{type}
